      "### Solution Overview > Visual Spec",
      "### Solution Overview > Avoid",
      "## Architecture Overview",
      "## Security Overview",
      "## Implementation Timeline",
      "## Support & SLA",
      "### Support & SLA > Support Summary Table",
      "### Support & SLA > Severity Table",
      "### Support & SLA > Avoid",
      "## Risk Register",
      "## Project Implementation & Delivery",

      "## Deployment",

      "## Support Appendix",

      "## Writer's Checklist",
      "### Writer's Checklist > Must Pass"
    ],
    "word_count": 2812,
    "has_sections": true
  },
  "issues": [],
  "pattern_hits": [
    {
      "pattern": "Unqualified Absolute Language",
      "evidence": [
        "complete",
        "always",
        "complete",
        "All",
        "All",
        "all",
        "all",
        "Always",
        "complete",
        "complete"
      ],
      "fix": "Add appropriate qualification or remove the absolute. \"Supports all EVM-compatible networks\" is defensible. \"Fully supports all requirements\" almost never is."
    }
  ]
}
